events.name: equipment_failure
events.description: Greenhouse dome seal breach — crops exposed to vacuum.

events.name: alien_signal
events.description: Strange crystalline structures found in deep drill core.

subsim_log.expression: (let ((survival (+ (* food 0.3) (* water 0.3) (* power 0.2) (* air 0.2)))) (if (> survival 0.6) (+ survival 0.1) (- survival 0.2)))
(let ((trust-score (* empathy resolve))) (if (> trust-score 0.4) (+ trust-score faith) (- trust-score paranoia)))

governance.rationale: Return to self-governance. No rulers, no masters.

meta_awareness.insight: Dax Iron wonders why the colony history feels like it follows a script.

memories.event: Anomalous radio signal detected from Phobos.
Nuclear reactor scram — emergency power only for 30 sols.
Phobos eclipses the sun — 30 seconds of twilight at noon.
Coronal mass ejection detected — 48 hours to shelter.
Message from Earth: supply ship confirmed for next launch window.

narrative:
## Year 32

### Events
- [RED] **equipment_failure**: Greenhouse dome seal breach — crops exposed to vacuum.
- [YEL] **alien_signal**: Strange crystalline structures found in deep drill core.

**Activity:** pray(3), code(3), terraform(2), rest(2), mediate(1)
**Resources:** food:100%[OK] | water:100%[OK] | power:100%[OK] | air:100%[OK] | medicine:100%[OK]
**Cohesion:** 70%

### Sub-simulations (8)
- depth-1 luna-tide: 1.05
- depth-2 luna-tide: 1.1550000000000002
- depth-1 grove-ash: 1.1

### Governance: anarchy [REJECTED]
Vote: 3 for / 11 against

*META: Dax Iron wonders why the colony history feels like it follows a script.*

---

diaries.text:
**Clay Kai** (air/sentinel) — Year 32

The air in me stirs with possibility.

Another system down.
The signal... I do not know what to think.

*— Clay Kai, sentinel*

**Grove Ash** (earth/farmer) — Year 32

Another year. We are still here.

Another system down.
The signal... I do not know what to think.

*— Grove Ash, farmer*

**Rust Vega** (earth/engineer) — Year 32

Another year. We are still here.

Another system down.
The signal... I do not know what to think.

*— Rust Vega, engineer*
